name: Lich Bane

passives.name: Spellblade
passives.effects: After using an [[Champion ability|ability]], your next basic attack within 10 seconds gains {{as|50% '''bonus''' attack speed}} and deals {{as|75% '''base''' AD}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} [[on-hit]] ({{fd|1.5}} second cooldown, starts after using the empowered attack).

effects_structured.raw: After using an [[Champion ability ability]], your next basic attack within 10 seconds gains {{as 50% '''bonus''' attack speed}} and deals {{as 75% '''base''' AD}} {{as (+ 40% AP)}} {{as '''bonus''' magic damage}} [[on-hit]] ({{fd 1.5}} second cooldown, starts after using the empowered attack).

simpleDescription: Grants a bonus to next attack after spell cast

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Lich Bane is modeled as a spell-weave burst pattern: cast an ability, then consume Spellblade with the next basic attack inside the 10-second window.
